component_recovery_summary.continuity_session_capsule: Current local code is strongest; Drive outreach and handoff docs strengthen product framing.
component_recovery_summary.collaboration_profile: Current local schema is strongest; Drive has behavior guidance but no stronger exact schema.
component_recovery_summary.insight_preservation: Needs explicit InsightRecord with belief basis and source refs.
component_recovery_summary.drift_detection: Lightweight MVP exists; full Gyro/Q Insight should wait.
component_recovery_summary.traillink_lineage: Phase 2; legacy code exists outside mainline.
component_recovery_summary.gyro_orientation: Q Insight is canonical spec; implementation incomplete.
component_recovery_summary.c3rp_routing: C3RP ROUTER is strong design source; local tests enforce core behavior.
component_recovery_summary.contradiction_detection: Veritas owns this; Continuity can consume summaries later.
component_recovery_summary.evidence_register: Keep separate; Continuity should only link by hashes/refs.
component_recovery_summary.librarian: No strong Drive spec found; requires private repo review.
component_recovery_summary.veritas: Current Veritas repo is stronger than Drive snippets.
component_recovery_summary.operating_manifest: Manifest Package v2 is strongest canon candidate.

top_five_continuity_additions: InsightRecord with why_we_believe_it, basis, source_refs, confidence, and status.
C3RP-style allowed_lanes and blocked_lanes in capsules.
Diode-style export gate as explicit redaction boundary.
Correction history linked to do_not_repeat items.
Metadata-only ARE/Truth Spine adapter with portable artifacts remaining canonical.
